## What changed

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Checklist

- [ ] I updated tests when behavior changed
- [ ] I updated docs when public behavior or configuration changed
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] I did not add secrets, credentials, or private environment data

## Notes for reviewers

Add any rollout, compatibility, or follow-up notes here.
